baseline.reason: Accurately identifies the memory leak of GF_PropertyMap when src_props is NULL triggers early return at line 893 without freeing dst_props. Correctly traces allocation through check_new_pid_props -> gf_props_new -> GF_SAFEALLOC. No unsupported speculation.
